title: [Creative Couture]
description: Ivy garlands are intertwined with strands of paper-cut flora and lengths of jewel-crafted insects, the decorative chains radiating outwards from a perforated starburst chandelier illuminating the room.  A grouping of wire-framed mannequins are framed by a duo of bronze-riveted containers, their leather surfaces branded in a variety of stylized fauna.  The subtle scent of bourbon and pink lavender permeates the shop, the tendrils of smoke traversing from a crescentic censer nestled in the far corner.
